records.ety: [L. daedalus cunningly wrought, fr. Gr. daida`llw; cf. <?/ to work cunningly. The word also alludes to the mythical Dædalus (Gr. Dai`dalos, lit., the cunning worker).]

defs: Cunningly or ingeniously formed or working; skillful; artistic; ingenious.
quotes: Our bodies decked in our dædalian arms.
The doth the dædal earth throw forth to thee, Out of her fruitful, abundant flowers.
